issues.sample: RECALL NHTSA: 18V229     SOUNDS CRITICAL AND UNSAFE.  AUDI EVEN STATES IN LETTER DO NOT PARK IN GARAGE DUE TO LIABILITY.  WILL NOT PAYOFF MY CAR IN ORDER TO OBTAIN A NEW ONE.  TRIED TWO DEALERSHIPS AND ALL THEY CARE ABOUT IS MAKING A BUCK.   SHOULD AT LEAST PROVIDE A RENTAL TILL

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 AUDI A4. APPROXIMATELY ONE WEEK AFTER THE VEHICLE HAD BEEN SERVICED FOR NHTSA CAMPAIGN NUMBER: 17V002000 (ENGINE AND ENGINE COOLING), A FAILURE OCCURRED. WHILE THE CONTACT WAS PARKING THE VEHICLE AT 1 MPH, THE BACKUP SENSOR FAILED AND THE BACKUP WARNIN

TL*THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 AUDI A4. THE CONTACT STATED THAT WHILE AT A STOP LIGHT, THE VEHICLE ROLLED BACKWARDS WHEN THE VEHICLE WAS IN DRIVE. THE FAILURE RECURRED SEVERAL TIMES. THE VEHICLE WAS NOT DIAGNOSED OR REPAIRED. THE MANUFACTURER WAS NOTIFIED OF THE FAILURE. THE FAILURE

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 AUDI A4. APPROXIMATELY ONE WEEK AFTER THE VEHICLE HAD BEEN SERVICED FOR NHTSA CAMPAIGN NUMBER: 17V002000 (ENGINE AND ENGINE COOLING), A FAILURE OCCURRED. WHILE THE CONTACT WAS PARKING THE VEHICLE AT 1 MPH, THE BACKUP SENSOR FAILED AND THE BACKUP WARNIN

I WAS DRIVING 65MPH ON THE FREEWAY WHEN ANOTHER CAR SWERVED AND CRASHED INTO THE PASSENGER SIDE OF MY CAR, THEN SENDING ME INTO THE CEMENT DIVIDING WALL ON THE DRIVER'S SIDE AT 65MPH.  BOTH SIDES OF MY CAR, AND THE FRONT OF MY CAR WERE BADLY DAMAGED.  IT WAS A VERY VIOLENT CRASH

narrative.headline: What 2015 Audi A4 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 43 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (35% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
